entry.title: Set up Ariba Buying base edition with S4 public Cloud TDD
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

We are trying to set up Ariba Buying base edition with our S4 TDD and we encountered some difficulties:

We can't integrate any suppliers catalogues as it is for our demo system , is there any test suppliers catalogues that we could use ?

We tried to test the process by requesting a unlisted item but the purchase request is stuck in ``Awaiting approval`` status with the message :  unable to display the content workflowinstance not found .

We didn't touch the Automatic Approval Variant so the Preq should be approved automatically.

I couldn't find anything in the documentation regarding this error, any ideas ?

Thanks 

Caroline

entry.title: Re: Prevent Autofocus on sap.ui.unified.calendar
entry.content: @ future readers: this sounds like an enhancement request or a bug. Please go ahead and create an issue at https://github.com/SAP/openui5/issues if the issue is still reproducible.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA supervisior dimension older configuration...
entry.content:
@YSE-1I deleted the unmapped values however if i click save afterwards in edit hierarchies, The UI becomes stuck in a loading/saving loop for a long time(10+ minutes.. and exiting afterwards makes WFA on HANA data Factory inaccessible so I have to close browser and wait a bit) with nothing happening. If I log out and back in the data comes back so deleting and trying to save afterwards so I can rerun initial build does not work since its not applying the delete and saving. That and the result of Manager ID with none Dimension should have returned 100s of single ids, however it just has the old hierarchy and like 7 ids in unmapped so its not even returning correct result for current dimension + result from old query. 

Edit: I have deleted and waited forever for it to try to finish, finally I got a popup (The current function cannot be completed because of a network issue). I tried again and same result. I'm unable to remove that hierachy from unmapped.

entry.title: Re: How to resolve "backend error occurred" in SAP GUI for HTML (WebGUI)
entry.content:
I have a problem, where in the action to attach file , happens a error below, the incident ocurr of way intermitent.

Backend error occurred
Please contact your system administrator.
Backend Error Details

Received "control not found" on batch step #1:
{"post":"action/402/wnd[0]/shellcont/shell/shellcont[0]/shell"}
ID: 785069
The complete batch was:
1: ("post":"action/402/wnd[0]/shellcont/shell/shellcont[0]/shell"}
2: ["post":"okcode/ses[0]","content":"=OK"}
3: {"post":"vkey/0/ses[0]}
4: ["get":"state/ur"]

The step by step is access ME22N, click in "More", "Objects Service", " Create", "Create Attach" and after choose any file and to click in OK.

Anybody, can help me with this case. My client have in the moment a version 785 Kernel.

entry.title: Re: How to turn off all notifications in the Compensation module
entry.content:
Hi @Olskar 

Only template by template. 

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Re: MRM Blog 3: Configuring Exchange Rate Updates in SAP Public Cloud

Hi,
are the only data sources BYOR (for bring your own rates data option) or ST (for Refinitiv data option)?
How can other data sources, such as ECB, be used if the Refinitiv data option was licensed?

Best regards,

Leon

entry.title: Asset Acquisition (GL TO FA) - Multiple change set
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In Asset Acquisition multiple change set IDs are not being created, and all requests are going under the same batch. Kindly provide a solution to this.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Re: My workflow for installing a new eclipse version (with AdT) - Eclipse 2020-06
entry.content:
I shoul add 10.1: Map ctrl+p to "Navigate to problems-view tab .

(See: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/how-to-use-adt-solely-with-a-keyboard-gt-navigation-in-eclipse/ba-p/13407488 )

Markus

entry.title: Re: Cash Mgm: how exclude FOC Sales Order flow
entry.content:
Hi,

Hello, I found this note I found this note ..."180177 - FSD: SD orders relavnce for cash managmnt&forecast...according to this ..."There is no option for setting the cash management and forecast relevency for specific sales document types or item categories.Only billing-relevance of the item category (field VBAP-FKREL) )."...  It means that should be handled by SD customization.

Att

RL

entry.title: Re: Object Store Referece: Failed to update the instance ....not allowed to change the plan of refer
entry.content: Afraid not. We put a workaround which is to create the instance manually in BTP and then set the mta for "existing-service"

entry.title: how user group is created automatically in SQ03
entry.content:
Hi All

There is a new user who joined company for whom we are trying to create user groups in transaction SQ03 which should start from SYSTQ and system is not allowing to create user group starting from SYSTQ

Can you please let us know how and where to create user group in SQ03

Note: system allow prefix but we wanted to know how system created user group for other users starting with SYSTQ in SQ03

Please respond as it is urgent requirement to create for new user

Regards

Jithendra Shivashankar

entry.title: Re: Selective Data Transfer to SAP Cloud ALM: Why It Matters and How to Approach It
entry.content:
To access the SAP Enterprise Support Academy link above, you need to be a registered SAP customer. If you are not registered, please use this link to do so: SAP Learning Hub. FYI - it may take a little longer than normal to receive an activation/verification email - we are in the process of a platform change.

We look forward to seeing you!

entry.title: Re: JDBC Adapter Fails to Parse Scalar Response from Stor...

entry.title: Re: Disable Automatic Clearing in EBS
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Pass empty or encoded values in SET_FORM_FIELD using application/x-www-form-urlencoded in ABAP
entry.content:
I'm working with an ABAP program that sends an HTTP POST request using application/x-www-form-urlencoded content type via CL_HTTP_CLIENT. The API expects a payload like this:

I cannot use SET_CDATA, so I have to use SET_FORM_FIELD. Here's what I'm trying:

{
"amount_to_capture": "50000",
"final_capture": "false",
"amount_details": {
"line_items": ""
}
}

 

ABAP
lo_http_client->request->set_method( 'POST' ). lo_http_client->request->set_header_field( name = 'Content-Type' value = 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' ). lo_http_client->request->suppress_form_fields_in_body( abap_false ).
lo_http_client->request->set_form_field( name = 'amount_to_capture' value = '50000' ). lo_http_client->request->set_form_field( name = 'final_capture' value = 'false' ). lo_http_client->request->set_form_field( name = 'amount_details[line_items]' value = '' ).

But the last field (line_items) is not sent at all when the value is empty (''), which causes the API to reject the request.

Even trying with a space or URL-encoded value like %20 didn't always behave consistently:

 

abap
 
lo_http_client->request->set_form_field( name = 'amount_details[line_items]' value = '%20' ).

How can I force ABAP to send an empty or hex-encoded value using SET_FORM_FIELD in a way that it is included in the request body?

Is there a known workaround for forcing ABAP to include fields with empty values when sending x-www-form-urlencoded content?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: CDS Projection View parameters not allowed
entry.content: Hi, same situation here, I still cannot understand how to use projection views for OData service consumption. If exposed as a query, only inA service are available (so not possible to consume them in Fiori apps Analytical List Report). What's the point of projection view then ?

entry.title: Cash Discount to customer
entry.content:
Hi,

While practicing SAP FICO in EH6, practice server, i am not getting the discount directly.

Either i have to change the 1st line item after simulating or in the first line entry posting iteslf i add the dicounted ammount. 

Are these the right ways or does the system geneterate automatically and the assigned amout shows 0?

#SAP SAP Help Portal

entry.content: Did you find a solution to this issue?

entry.title: Re: Learning Path for SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: @Joh28 Thank you so much for the support Joh! I am glad that this is helpful for you.

entry.title: Unable to change payment terms for invoice
entry.content:
Hi SAP community, 

One of our user is currently trying to change the payment terms on an invoice but they are receiving the following error: 


Payment reference 86342136 is incorrect for Finland.
Message No: F0494

Diagnosis: 
There is a check routine defined in the system for country FI. When this routine was used for country 86342136, it found an error. 
The error may be the result of an incorrect check digit. Other causes may be incorrect field length(the number is too great or the value too short) or the use of a character which is not permitted(an alphanumeric value in a numeric field, for example)

Procedure: 
Check whether the number was transferred correctly from the original document. 

Effects on customizing: 
You can define when this system message is to be issued in accordance with your requirements.
You do this in customizing as follows: Cross-Application components - Bank directory - Change message control
The application area and message number can be taken from the technical documentation.

Kindly help on how to resolve this issue.

entry.title: Re: WalkMe Now Available in SAP SuccessFactors : A New Era of Digital Adoption
entry.content: What are the prerequisites to have the "Understand your compensation" walk-through appear for end-users?  We can't get it to show for our population.

entry.title: Re: Can the SAP connector extract data from an ADSO to MS...
entry.content:
Well, the answer is probably "no".

The .NET Connector can only be used to call RFC-enabled function modules in an SAP ABAP system (like NetWeaver, ECC, R/3, S/4, Business Warehouse, etc.) It can neither connect to "ADSO", nor to Power BI.

entry.title: Re: Safety stock issue due to supplier delay
entry.content: Here you need to take into consideration why the vendor is not able to deliver the products as committed.  If the vendor dont have proper planning or capacity to produce the ordered components, then, your client has to reconsider to go with an alternate vendor who can supply on time.  Of course, the realistic delays can be addressed with some work arounds but not for the vendor's inability to supply

entry.title: Re: Unable to debug Third Party ALES Process flow in SM58
entry.content: Probably, it would have been nice had you explained what the issue is and why you were trying debug mode

entry.title: Navigating the Tariffs Jungle: How SAP IBP Empowers Resilience in an Uncertain World
entry.content:
In today’s dynamic global marketplace, marked by an unpredictable tariff landscape and unprecedented supply chain disruptions, companies cannot afford to rely solely on yesterday’s playbook. The recent U.S. tariff regime—characterized by sweeping measures such as a 10% duty on all imported goods, dramatic reciprocal tariffs reaching up to 50% on certain countries, and even staggering rates for pivotal markets like China—has redefined the rules of international trade. With effective tariff rates soaring to unprecedented levels, supply chain leaders face persistent uncertainty and escalating costs. In such a challenging environment, the imperative is clear: build resilience that not only absorbs shocks but transforms risk into a competitive advantage. This is where SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP), backed by seamless integration to supply chain execution systems, steps in as a game-changing solution.

Supply Chain Visibility

SAP Integrated Business Planning isn’t just about managing data across the supply chain—it’s a holistic approach that integrates commercial, strategic, operational, and digital resilience into your decision-making process. When tariffs surge unpredictably, the effectiveness of your supply chain planning can mean the difference between merely surviving turbulent times and thriving despite adversity. With SAP IBP, companies gain real-time insights, scenario-driven analytics, and the flexibility to dynamically adjust their strategies to mitigate the impact of tariffs and shifting market conditions.

At the heart of SAP IBP is its robust scenario planning capability—just what’s needed in a world where three potential futures loom large: pragmatic de-escalation with moderated tariffs, a “holding the line” scenario that keeps rates high to pressure trading partners, or a disorderly escalation spiralling into broader economic turmoil. The platform enables organizations to simulate varying scenarios and assess their potential impact on cost structures, supply networks, and market demand—offering a crystal ball of insights that empower proactive planning rather than reactionary adjustments. By incorporating forecasting models and what-if analysis, SAP IBP ensures that your supply chain strategy remains agile as policies shift and the economic landscape transforms.

One of the key advantages of SAP IBP is its capacity to integrate data and processes across the entire supply chain, creating a unified view that connects sourcing, production, inventory, and logistics. Tariff changes can abruptly alter the financial and operational calculus of global trade—from impacting raw material costs in the production phase to the bottom line after goods transit borders. With SAP IBP, decision-makers can swiftly pinpoint which segments of their operations are most vulnerable to tariff volatility and reallocate resources, diversify suppliers, or even consider nearshoring alternatives to mitigate risk. This seamless integration not only translates into real-time cost tracking but also equips companies with the intelligence needed to adjust procurement and logistics strategies on the fly.

In tandem with these operational advantages, SAP IBP also reinforces commercial resilience. As tariff-induced cost pressures ripple through markets, consumer behavior and demand patterns are bound to evolve—often unpredictably. The predictive analytics built into SAP IBP allow organizations to capture subtle market shifts and forecast changes in consumer demand. Armed with these insights, companies can recalibrate pricing strategies, tailor product assortments, and reassess channel strategies to maintain competitive positioning despite higher costs. In essence, SAP IBP helps businesses not only navigate the immediate pitfalls of tariff hikes but also capitalize on emerging opportunities in a disrupted market.

Digital resilience is another cornerstone of SAP IBP. In today’s fast-paced environment, manual planning and outdated legacy systems simply can’t keep pace with the velocity of change. SAP IBP leverages advanced AI algorithms and real-time data monitoring to provide an agile platform where automated adjustments are the norm rather than the exception. This digital backbone ensures that the supply chain remains not only responsive to sudden policy shifts but also continuously optimized for efficiency. Enhanced transparency across business networks means that every stakeholder—from procurement managers to financial executives—can access timely, relevant data to inform strategic decisions, thereby reducing the lag between market disruption and adaptive response.

The current tariff landscape is a clarion call for strategic investment in resilient, integrated planning solutions. One of the major innovations that comes into picture is characteristics or attribute-based planning with SAP IBP. With attribute-based planning, each supply element can be tagged with its country of origin, and each demand with its destination-specific trade rules. Now, instead of a one-size-fits-all production and sourcing strategy, the planning system intelligently segments manufacturing and procurement based on these attributes. Planning and execution should go together. SAP S/4HANA Supply and Demand segmentation acts as the glue that ensures there is uninterrupted process flow between the planning in IBP and the execution process from procurement, production, warehousing to final delivery in SAP S/4HANA.

Finally, tariff fluctuations can severely disrupt order fulfillment, creating inventory imbalances and increasing lead times. SAP S/4HANA Advanced Available-to-Promise (aATP) ensures that companies meet customer expectations by intelligently managing product availability across a complex, multi-tiered supply network. By leveraging real-time data and demand-driven allocation, aATP dynamically adjusts order commitments, prioritizes profitable customers, and reroutes shipments based on tariff changes and capacity constraints.

By embracing SAP Integrated Business Planning coupled with complementing supply chain execution capabilities in S/4HANA, companies position themselves to transform tariff-induced disruption into a catalyst for innovation and improved operational alignment. Rather than being paralyzed by uncertainty, supply chain leaders can harness robust planning tools to create adaptive frameworks that evolve in lockstep with the challenges of global commerce.

Now more than ever, the ability to respond quickly and decisively to external shocks is not merely a luxury—it’s a business imperative. With SAP Integrated Business Planning at the core of your supply chain strategy, you’re empowered to reimagine how your organization navigates not just tariffs, but the vast array of disruptions defining this new normal. In the face of rising tariffs and economic unpredictability, let resilience be your competitive edge and innovation your guiding principle. For further guidance, I recommend to listen to this crisp and very recent podcast: "Transforming Tariff Challenges into Opportunities Through Better Planning with SAP’s Jay Foster and Lori Harner".

Bootcamp Get Started with SAP S/4HANA Cloud - 100% GRATUITO en español!

  • Fechas: 17, 19, 24 y 26 de junio y 1 de julio
  • Total: 5 clases

entry.title: Re: Can Screens be customized in IAS?
entry.content: Yes it can be customized.

entry.title: Three new courses for SAP Business One, Web Client are now live on learning.sap.com
entry.content:
This public training, featuring a mix of video tutorials and practical examples, covers comprehensive aspects of the Web client through three distinct courses: 

  • Discovering SAP Business One, Web Client Logistics (TB2000) – learn how to use and personalize the Web client, manage master data and activities, handle the sales and procurement processes, and monitor Inventory Transactions 
  • Utilizing SAP Business One, Web Client Accounting (TB300)- explore, create, and manage various types of journal entries, use journal entry templates and recurring entries, and review and customize the chart of accounts to fit organizational needs. 
  • Implementing Customization Tools and Analytics in SAP Business One, Web Client (TB2900)- integrate Microsoft applications with the Web client, customize user-defined elements (UDF, UDT, UDO and UDV) to tailor the Web client environment to your specific needs. Also, leverage the Web client powerful analytics to enhance visibility on the business performance. 

Pass all the quizzes in each course and receive digital badges to share in social media. 

Questions we received from users and might be useful to the entire community: 

1) Q: I am a consultant working for an SAP Business One partner. Is this training relevant to me? 

A: Yes indeed. The training is at a beginner level for business users and consultants. 

2) Q: I am interested in learning about the Web client but I am not a customer or a partner. Can I take the training too?  

A: Anyone can take these public courses free of charge. If you like to track your progress, complete quizzes and earn a public badge you would also need to register. 

3) Q: What is the difference between these courses and the 'Exploring SAP Business One, Web Client'  learning journey? 

A: With all the great content in FP 2502, the ‘Exploring SAP Business One, Web Client' learning journey was getting too big, so it was split into these three new courses.  

4) Q: I have bookmarked the Exploring SAP Business One, Web Client learning journey. Will this link work? 

A: Yes it will. The URL of the Exploring SAP Business One, Web Client learning journey is now redirected to the Discovering SAP Business One, Web Client Logistics course. 

Join our SAP Business One, Web client experts community today!

entry.title: SAP Sapphire 2025 in Orlando: Discover the Power of GenAI for Enterprise Transformation
entry.content:
The countdown is on for SAP Sapphire 2025, happening May 20–21 in Orlando, and I couldn’t be more excited to share how Generative AI is transforming the enterprise landscape. As Vice President and Chief Product Officer of Generative AI at SAP Business AI, I’ll be leading several key sessions that showcase how AI is enabling faster, smarter, and more efficient SAP implementations.

With experience from leadership roles at Google, Intuit, and LinkedIn, I’ve spent my career helping businesses unlock the value of technology. Now at SAP, I’m focused on delivering reliable, responsible, and relevant AI solutions that help organizations around the world transform how they work. Whether you're a consultant, developer, executive, or technologist, this is your opportunity to hear directly from me about what’s next for intelligent enterprise transformation with SAP and Generative AI.

A couple of words about me:
My name is Natalie Han, PhD, and I’m the Vice President and Chief Product Officer of Generative AI at SAP Business AI.
With a background leading AI and data science teams at Google, Intuit, and LinkedIn, I bring deep experience in enterprise-scale AI innovation. At SAP, I focus on building reliable, responsible, and relevant Generative AI solutions that are reshaping how businesses run. I'm also a Stanford-trained AI researcher and an advocate for ethical AI and advancing women in technology.

Here’s where you can find me at SAP Sapphire:
I’ll be speaking in four sessions across the two day event. I hope you’ll join me for these conversations that dive into how SAP Joule is transforming consulting and development. 

SAP Joule for Consultants: AI-driven project speed - BAI2596 Solution Demo 
Tuesday, May 20 | 1:30 PM – 1:50 PM EDT
Experience how the SAP Joule for Consultants solution transforms SAP project delivery. We look at how AI-enabled guidance helps consultants work faster, optimize processes, and stay aligned with SAP best practices, accelerating your transformation projects.

Enhancing SAP software projects with AI-driven guidance and code generation - BAI3412 Strategy Talk
Tuesday, May 20 | 4:30 PM - 4:50 PM EDT
Discover how the Joule copilot helps developers and consultants increase productivity. Learn how AI-driven guidance accelerates implementations, while code generation in the ABAP programming language automates coding tasks. See how Joule streamlines workflows, reduces manual effort, and supports best practices—helping teams work smarter and faster.

Transforming SAP software implementations with SAP Joule for Consultants - BAI5026v - Customer Success Story
Wednesday, May 21 | 4:30 PM – 4:50 PM CEST 
I’ll be in conversation with Hendrik Florian Thörner, Partner at KPMG, tune in to learn how AI-enabled guidance streamlines implementations, boost consultant productivity, and helps team align to best practices for faster smarter outcomes

Joule Agents: Your questions answered by the experts - BAI2607 
Wednesday, May 21 | 1:00 PM – 1:20 PM EDT 
Join me and Christian Karaschewitz, SAP AI Product Incubation Lead, for a candid Q&A. Bring your questions, we’ll go deep on Joule agents, business value, and adoption strategies. 

 

Why you should attend:
If you're attending SAP Sapphire, don’t miss these sessions. You’ll get: 

  • an insider look at how SAP Joule for Consultants and SAP Joule for Developers are changing the game for consulting and development 
  • real-world stories from partners like KPMG 
  • a clear view into how Generative AI boosts productivity, streamlines SAP implementations, and improves outcomes for businesses 

I’m excited to connect in Orlando and share how we’re making AI not just powerful, but practical and impactful for real enterprise challenges. These sessions are packed with insight, live demos, and real-world results. 

 

Now let’s hear from you:
I'd love to know: What are your top questions about using Generative AI in your SAP projects? Or just for fun, answer this question in the comments:

Question:
If an AI writes a joke and no one laughs, does it update its algorithm or just blame the humans? 😄

Let me know your answer below 👇

entry.title: Re: Users and dates are not being saved in my RAP applica...
entry.content:
@MioYasutake  this is the behavior : 

Do you have a sample of mapping between the CDS View and the persistent table for the date and user fields? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Empty parameters after saving JSON for binding creati...
entry.content:
Hi, Uwe,

I tried to follow the steps at Integrate SAP LeanIX | SAP Help Portal and also saw what you report -> the parameters appear empty despite adding the scope entries to the Parameter step.

This is working as designed.  You can see details in KBA 3481257 - How to find out the scopes already assigned to an SAP Cloud ALM API Service Instance? -> the steps in the Resolution inform how you can tell what scope entries were maintained in the resultant binding that was created.  So long as you see the maintained values in the output of the steps described there, as I saw, you properly configured this and the scopes are in place.

In case you need further assistance on this, you should log a support case to check.  Provide the downloaded service binding so support can use in with steps in KBA 3481257 to check the contents for you.

Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: How to add an attribute to an structure field for a XML file
entry.content:
Hi,

I´m facing the next problem, I have a structure for a XML transformation that works ok, but I need to add "attributes" in some fields, for example:

<ExtraInfoDoc name="CondicionVentaOtros">Content for ExtraInfoDoc field</ExtraInfoDoc>

How can I add the attribute to be displayed in the XML file?

Thanks on advance.

entry.title: Re: Tricentis XScan is failing to scan a page on Microsof...
entry.content: Dear Bruno_E, since an answer was provided to your question, and there has been no other activity on the topic, we have accepted the answer as a solution on your behalf. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Paula

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM and SNOW integration - create incident for...
entry.content: Dear Subhra, since an answer was provided to your question, and there has been no other activity on the topic, we have accepted the answer as a solution on your behalf. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Paula

entry.title: Re: Error Message when deploying from Business Applicatio...
entry.content:
Hi,

This message means that your BTP subaccount or organization has reached its quota limit for routes (used in Cloud Foundry). Routes are essentially mappings between your applications and URLs, and BTP limits how many of these can be created based on your quota settings.

Please check whether you have a quota limit under BTP > Cloud Foundry > Space Quotas :

You can also view existing routes in BTP > Cloud Foundry > Spaces > <your_space> > Routes :

You can extend quotas under Global Account > Entitlements or delete unnecessary routes

entry.title: ppm portfolio item type related date sync
entry.content:
We definded different item types. The requierement is to have different variants of synchronisation of dates related to the Portfolio item type.

We looked through documentation. Checked for Badi. But we could not find a solution. The only idea we have right now is to develop.

entry.title: Re: Bootcamp SAP Business Technology Platform | SAP Future Talent | Spanish
entry.content:
Estimada Isadora, 

¡Qué gran noticia! Estamos sumamente entusiasmados en base a tu respuesta. Nos gustaría consultarte si es requisito disponer de una casilla institucional (con dominio de UNTREF en nuestro caso particular) para poder participar, debido a que no todos los estudiantes interesados disponen de la misma. 

Quedamos atentos. Desde ya muchas gracias.

entry.title: Re: Can Screens be customized in IAS?
entry.content: Thanks Yogananda! Can you please point me to theblog/help doc that describes this procedure?

entry.title: Re: How do I deploy a SAP CAPM model to HANA cloud
entry.content:
Hi @rmuhuri ,

If you want to deploy your CAP back-end data model from Business Application Studio to a SAP HANA Cloud database on BTP, take a look at this tutorial : https://developers.sap.com/group.hana-cloud-cap-setup.html

entry.title: Event-Based Revenue Recognition - Customer projects SPTM Key
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,
We are implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public and have some customer projects managed with revenue recognition key SPTM (Time & Expenses) and COSPTM as assignment rule.

However, when we post expenses to these projects (e.g. with transaction RKU1), the system does not trigger the corresponding event-based revenue recognition posting.
We have checked that the GL accounts are included in YBPS_E000, and also that this cost element group is included in the sources YE0 and YS0.

Could you please help us with this issue?
Thanks in advance

María

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM vs CHARM in managing one landscape with...
entry.content: Hi, Maurizio_Manera, Since this is not yet developed, we cannot know the answer to your question at this point. The best thing you can do is share your input about your needs here in the Influence Campaign: - SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3501

entry.title: What replaces field PROVO in /SAPSLL/CUHDSTA in GTS4EH?
entry.content:
Hello,

I cannot seem to find any document, OSS or SAP Help Portal information regarding the field PROVO in GTS 11 table /SAPSLL/CUHDSTA. I know this table does not exist anymore.

However, there should be a field (or fields) that can used to perform the same functionality in GTSE4H. Does anyone have any idea?

Regards, Dean.

entry.title: Re: Copy Custom field from service order to PR
entry.content:
Hello, 

Found some blogs about integration of service orders with logistic side, hope you will find it helpful:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/service-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-2302/ba-p/13548862

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/sourcing-procurement-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-2002/ba-p/13445112

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/enhancing-the-standard-part-1-logistics-integration-for-service-orders-in-s/ba-p/13572282

Also please find below documentation regarding creating custom fields and logic, that might help to solve your case:

https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/b5670aaaa2364a29935f40b16499972d/57909455bf7c4fdd8bcf48d76c1eae33.html?locale=en-US

Best regards, 

Jagoda Drwiega

entry.title: Re: How to add an attribute to an structure field for a XML file
entry.content: Which type of transformation: ST (<tt:...>) or XSLT (<xsl:...>)?

entry.title: Re: Pass empty or encoded values in SET_FORM_FIELD using application/x-www-form-urlencoded in ABAP
entry.content:
Please use the formatting option:

lo_http_client->request->set_method( 'POST' ).
lo_http_client->request->set_header_field( name = 'Content-Type' 
                                           value = 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' ).
lo_http_client->request->suppress_form_fields_in_body( abap_false ).

lo_http_client->request->set_form_field( name = 'amount_to_capture' 
                                         value = '50000' ).
lo_http_client->request->set_form_field( name = 'final_capture' 
                                         value = 'false' ).
lo_http_client->request->set_form_field( name = 'amount_details[line_items]'
                                         value = '' ).

entry.title: Re: Pass empty or encoded values in SET_FORM_FIELD using application/x-www-form-urlencoded in ABAP
entry.content: Why can't you use SET_CDATA?

entry.title: Re: How to use Notifications in SAP Cloud ALM?
entry.content: Dear PeterVyboh, since an answer was provided to your question, and there has been no other activity on the topic, we have accepted the answer as a solution on your behalf. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Application Job Template not working for Subcontraction Challan Creation (J_1IG_SUBCON_JT) Publi
entry.content: Hello, is this issue still shows up? Have you try creating other templates for testing purposes to see if this populates? It might be hard to provide help if there is no error message, please try to see if this issue occurs during any other process. Regards, Jagoda

entry.title: Re: Automizing authentication with SAP Datasphere CLI via OAuth 2.0
entry.content:
Hi @Anton_HH,

Thank you for a informative blog. While running the command using secret file I am unable to retrieve the space. 
datasphere spaces list --secrets-file secrets-file.JSON --verbose

The error I am getting after executing I am getting the below error: 
Request failed with message "unable to get local issuer certificate"
Failed to return a list of existing spaces

Your expert advise can help to resolve the issue. 

Thank you!!

entry.title: Re: FAQ & Troubleshooting Guide for @sap/datasphere-cli
entry.content:
Hi @jascha_meiswinkel ,

Thank you for a informative blog. While running the command using secret file I am unable to retrieve the space. 
datasphere spaces list --secrets-file secrets-file.JSON --verbose

The error I am getting after executing I am getting the below error: 
Request failed with message "unable to get local issuer certificate"
Failed to return a list of existing spaces

Your expert advise can help to resolve the issue. 

Thank you!!

entry.title: Re: How to monitor Communication Arrangments via Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi,  RupertP,

Cloud ALM 'monitors' at the system/service level, not the communication arrangement. 
You can find details of
Supported Solutions at: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/supported-solutions
Configuration Info: https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/setup-managed-services.html
Operations Export Portal (overview, content, setup/config, How-to videos at: https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal.html
For any feature that is not available that you feel would help your business, feel free to add your ideas in the Influence Campaign:

 - SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation  https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3501
 - SAP Cloud ALM for Operations https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3525

Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: Re: Connect Postman with Cloud ALM to create Project usin...
entry.content: Dear Sandeep, since an answer was provided to your question, and there has been no other activity on the topic, we have accepted the answer as a solution on your behalf. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Paula

entry.title: Re: SAP versions with the years.... and where comes Netwe...
entry.content:
Here is the article with the details you are looking for - flip through the decades of history:

https://www.sap.com/about/company/history.html

entry.title: Re: Opinion about ALM Cloud Transport Management
entry.content: Dear Hugo13, since an answer was provided to your question, and there has been no other activity on the topic, we have accepted the answer as a solution on your behalf. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Paula

entry.title: Re: How to assign Contact Person - Partner in already mig...
entry.content:
Hi, @vatsal_vora!

The official documentation of the Migration Object has relevant information about this in the tab Challenge with Partner Functions and Contact Persons:

  • Customer | SAP Help Portal

In it, it's said that:

  • To assign a contact person as partner, first create the customer with the contact person, but without sales data. Then, use the Customer - extend existing record by new org levels migration object in a second step to assign the sales data together with the contact person in partner capacity.

You mentioned that "we have loaded Customer master using Migrate your data including Sales area and Sales partner data". It'd make sense then that the errors you mentioned (Sales area already available) are being thrown.

I hope this helps!

Best regards,
Caio

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA private cloud edition FI organizational elements
entry.content:
Hello SAP FI experts,

I'm currently studying for the SAP FI consultant certification and ran across a point for which I need clarification. In FI there are several client-based objects that can be modified at the company code level. For example, you define your chart of accounts at the client level, but you can choose which accounts to create within a given company code.

When it comes to the financial statement version, it's defined at the client level which makes sense since you need a standardized financial statement structure for group reporting across legal entities. But I don't understand why you wouldn't be able to maintain FSVs at the company code level? 
My external reporting can change based on legal entity, especially if they're in different geographies with different regulatory frameworks.

Thanks in advance!

Ben Pietrancosta

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ben-pietrancosta-593484192/

entry.title: Re: How to get a list of Features (and TRs) for a schedul...
entry.content: Dear Bruno, since an answer was provided to your question, and there has been no other activity on the topic, we have accepted the answer as a solution on your behalf. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Paula

entry.title: Re: Can we use migration cockpit to change the fixed asse...
entry.content:
Hi @Venkat_veera and @Chuma,

To complement the thread, we also have this answer documented in one of our KBAs:

  • 2650201 - Migration Cockpit: How to create/update data records

Its Cause section is quite intuitive:

  • It's not possible to update a record with the Migration Cockpit.

Besides that, as @Chuma said, the KBA also states that:

  • To update and change an existing record, a mass maintenance and/or processing app available for the Migration Object must be used. This is the standard behavior.

Best regards,
Caio

entry.title: Re: Monitoring Service Key Expiration which are under BTP...

You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Paula

entry.title: SAP BTP Role Collections in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Has anyone tried accessing BTP collection roles assigned to a user in SAP Build Apps? We are trying to manage visibility of certain UI elements based on the user's BTP role assigned. But unfortunately, the roles are not available at runtime.

entry.title: Re: Users and dates are not being saved in my RAP applica...
entry.content:
@ronaldo_aparecido

Here is a snippet of sample mapping. 

  mapping for <persistent_table_name>
  {
    <cds_field1> = <table_filed1>;
    <cds_field2> = <table_filed2>;
  }

entry.title: Re: How to add an attribute to an structure field for a XML file
entry.content: Sandra, It´s a simple transformation <tt:..>

entry.title: What's up Katowice? SAP event by Accenture
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community Katowice!

We are happy to announce about meetup that will happen very soon!

When: 22.05.2025

Where: Rawa Ink in Katowice

About: SAP S/4HANA Treasury & Risk Management, SAP Business Technology Platform, Agenci AI

How to register: submit the form available here

entry.title: Delete Component BOM Without Change Number
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m working with BOM management in SAP S/4HANA and have a specific situation. I need to adjust the validity dates of a BOM component using transaction CEWB or CS02, but I want to do this without using a change number (change management) and without completely deleting the material.

In a different environment, I was able to expire a component by setting its “Valid To” date via CEWB without using a change number — and it worked perfectly. However, in the current environment, doing the same action doesn’t work — the change isn't reflected or saved.

In the current scenario, if I delete a component via CEWB, it is completely removed from the BOM, instead of remaining with an expired validity.
What I would like is that, when I remove the component, it should remain in the BOM marked as expired (valid until today), and not be deleted.

Unfortunately, I can’t remember what setting allowed this in the other environment.
I’ve already reviewed and tested the parameters in transaction OS27, but that didn’t solve the issue.

Does anyone know what configuration or authorization enables the CEWB transaction to allow validity date changes — specifically to expire components — without requiring a change number?

Any insights would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: TRM Transaction Management - Reverse Cash Flow
entry.content:
Dear All,

Customer has implemented S/4HANA Public Cloud including Treasury Management.

Customer is trying to reverse posted Cash Flow. According to process steps App Manage Financial Transactions in Edit Mode, Cash Flow tab, and then choose Editing Mode -> Reverse. The Reverse option is greyed. 

Please advise how this could be solved and cash flow reversed.

Kind regards,

Slađana

entry.title: Re: Integrating Open SQL Schema Tables with SAP Datasphere Space using Dataflow
entry.content: Great blog!  Thanks Mrinal for sharing !

entry.title: Re: Proxy setup of CALM
entry.content:
Hello Raja,

SAP Connector has limited use in SAP Cloud ALM
Please review this BLOG as it describes the 3 supported scenarios.

For connecting Systems and Services to SAP Cloud ALM, this is the single source of truth so please only use this page from the SAP Cloud ALM Expert Portal for Operations.

This is a living document that gets updated regularly so I suggest to bookmark it as your guide to connecting Services and Systems to SAP Cloud ALM

Regards,

Paul

entry.title: Re: Proxy setup of CALM
entry.content: This Blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/sap-cloud-alm-and-sap-cloud-connector/ba-p/13695102

entry.title: Re: A Better Admin Program for SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello @kostertim, 
Great tool, wanted to check with you if we have any possibility to run and monitor replication flows with this?

entry.title: Re: 1902-Enable Self-Service Features in SuccessFactors Reporting
entry.content:
@Bernardo_Santos the activation documentation can be found here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PEOPLE_ANALYTICS/dad69084edb947e98ebede671ecd26f0/718f748626f74a25834133add54a1721.html?locale=en-US

You need to do more then activate IAS. IAS is a requirement, but you also need to enable Story Reports. You can then setup all reports you need or import the templates from the content store (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PEOPLE_ANALYTICS/dad69084edb947e98ebede671ecd26f0/64dd3ae6bdd9463ca300da7242c1d4c9.html?locale=en-US)

entry.title: Re: Appgyver not send "Cookie" key in header
entry.content:
Hi

I want to know if this tread has a solution. I have the same problem.

Using the web preview works great but when compile app in android or with the android preview app. I get the error "Network request failed".

entry.title: Re: Auto propose amount in Allocated/Residual amount for...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

such a functionality doesn't exist in the Reprocess Bank Statement Items app. Please open a request on the SAP influence tool: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2400

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: S4 call to F4IF_INT_TABLE_VALUE_REQUEST returning all values even when selecting just one.
entry.content:
Hello Group

I'm facing a weird situation, this is a custom screen where we have a field that shows available values upon doing an F4. We are using function F4IF_INT_TABLE_VALUE_REQUEST. We are passing the multiple choice option to the FM but even if the user is selecting one of the entries available, all of the entries displayed as options are returned as if they were chose. 

Has anyone faces a similar situation?

Thank you

Francisco

entry.title: SAP Developer News May 8th, 2025
entry.content:
DESCRIPTION

Mass Import Excel to SAP CAP – Now Made Simple with CDS Plugin 

  • Blog post https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/mass-import-excel-sap-cap-now-made-simple-cds-plugin-marian-zeis-midfc/  
  • The Hitchhiker’s Guide To The Galaxy reference https://www.clivebanks.co.uk/THHGTTG/THHGTTGradio2.htm#:~:text=without%20all%20that%20tedious%20mucking%20about%20in%20hyperspace 

Building Intelligent Data Applications with SAP HANA Cloud Knowledge Graph Engine 

  • Building Intelligent Data Applications with SAP HANA Cloud Knowledge Graphs: https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/missiondetail/4568/4856/?tab=overview  
  • HANA Tech Con: https://hanatech.community/ 
  • The new CodeJam topic: SAP HANA Cloud for AI Applications: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam-blog-posts/sap-codejam-topics/ba-p/221407#codejam1  

SAP Fiori development newsletter May 

  • SAP Fiori Development Newsletter May 2025: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/sap-fiori-development-newsletter-may-2025-issue-34/ba-p/14091410  

The SAP BTP Guidance Framework 

  • Start page on the SAP Help Portal https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-btp-guidance-framework/guidance-framework/what-is-sap-btp-guidance-framework  

 

CHAPTER TITLES  

0:00 Intro 

0:10 Mass Import Excel to SAP CAP – Now Made Simple with CDS Plugin 

1:39 Building Intelligent Data Applications with SAP HANA Cloud Knowledge Graph Engine 

3:18 SAP Fiori Development Newsletter May 2025 (Bonus Cat) 

4:24 The SAP BTP Guidance Framework  

 

TRANSCRIPTION

[Intro] This is the SAP Developer News for May 8th, 2025.

[DJ] So the community is still excelling in collaboration and producing top quality code and content. Here is a recent example from Marian Zeis. Now, it involves the UI5 spreadsheet importer, which we've covered on previous news items on this show. but this time it also involves a cds plugin for the sap cloud application programming model which means it's now possible to upload and bypass the routing of data the mass data through the front end and all the subsequent odata calls and the processing involved and upload directly to a cap back end the cds plugin was originally written by wouter lemer another friend of the community and it allows this direct import to a capped back end without all that tedious mucking about in hyperspace and front end of course that was a reference to the Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy if you didn't recognize that already with the latest release that's 2.1.0 of the UI5 spreadsheet importer you can now enable the use of this CDS plugin and upload with no code required on the front-end to change. Pretty neat. Anyway, Marian's blog post has all the details checking out. Link in the description.

[Vitaliy] Have you heard about the Knowledge Graph engine in SAP HANA Cloud? It came as the new functionality in QRC 1 this year. Now our COE in the US prepared a discovery mission for you, where you can go through a series of exercises and ready to use code to discover what KGE is, how you use the graph transformers to convert unstructured data into the triples and store them in SAP HANA Cloud, or how to turn structured data into the ontology that you can use in your AI applications. Check this out. I just finished this discovery mission and I learned quite a few things myself. There are some other AI capabilities that were delivered during a recent couple of months and to be able to give you some more exercises, I created the new Code Jam topic that is called AI Application Fundamentals with SAP HANA Cloud. we are planning to have such a code gem as well after the hana tech con so if you are attending this event in WalIdorf in Germany in July then please check this event and decide if you want to join this sap code jam where we are going to go through all this new exciting AI functionality to you in SAP HANA, see you there.

[Michelle] Hey, y'all. For all you front-end nerds out there, the May 2025 edition of the SAP Fiori Development Newsletter is now live, and it's packed with insights you don't want to miss. This issue covers cutting-edge updates to SAPUI5, including new tools and features to streamline your development process. There's all kinds of different updates over a variety of different topics, with links going into further detail, so there's a little something for everyone. One of my big bucket list items is visiting all seven continents, and a bit of news that I found really interesting in this issue is that it turns out SAPUI5 has already beat me to it. It's on all seven continents, including Antarctica, and it's crazy to think about how truly global SAPUI5 is. If that interested you as well, and you want to learn more, or you just want to stay ahead of the curve and discover how SAP Fiori is shaping the future of development, head over to the SAP Community page to check it out now. The issue is linked below, and as always, happy coding!

[DJ] So before we end this news episode, we just wanted to make you aware of the SAP BTP Guidance Framework. You might already know about the SAP BTP Developers Guide. Well, think of the Guidance Framework as sort of one level up from that, something that contains the SAP BTP developers guide and lots more. Now the aim of this framework is to provide architects and administrators as well as developers all they need to know to build and run and maintain enterprise grade and enterprise scale applications and solutions on SAP BTP. We've included a link to the sort of landing page to the guidance framework which is on the SAP help portal and from there you have links to all the individual components. Happy learning!

entry.title: Re: Build Process Automation: Call Web Service with Desti...
entry.content:
Hello MioYasutake


There could be several reasons for the timeout.


My suspicion is that there is a communication problem between SAP BPA and the destination in SAP BTP, meaning SAP BPA cannot access the destination that configured in SAP BTP.


Did you config the destination-name as the destination in SAP BPA or you use the link like in Postman?
A screenshot of the Destination configuration from SAP BPA would be helpful here.


Best regards
Dennis

entry.title: Re: SAP Best Practices Succession Management MDF Position...
entry.content: Were you able to solve it? I have the same error and couldn't find the solution.

entry.title: Re: What's New in SAP Subscription Billing (Q1 2025)
entry.content:
Along with using SAP Subscription Billing to model and manage your subscription pricing and billing processes, SAP Entitlement Management integrates with SAP Subscription Billing supporting subscription/software fulfillment/provisioning, license consumption, and software usage and adoption.

If you are interested in SAP Entitlement Management, and how it supports "Subscription Management for Software" in the new scope item 5SW, to be released soon, please join or review later our webinar on May 13 with an overview and detailed preview demo of the new scope item: https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blog-posts-by-sap/webinar-entitlement-management-preview-for-scope-item-5sw-subscription/ba-p/14085814

entry.title: 1H 2025: Explore the Reimagined Candidate Experience and New AI-Assisted Capabilities in Recruiting
entry.content:
With the 1H 2025 release, we have delivered new capabilities within SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting to improve the candidate experience and accelerate hiring with AI.

Through customer influence on the Customer Community and innovative product enhancements, we are bringing your ideas to life and driving improvements across the recruiting experience.

To learn more watch the on-demand Q&A webinar: 1H 2025 Product Release Webinars. To hear about the roadmap and broader view of our strategy, watch the Global Event Series Strategic Roadmap Updates H1 2025.

All of the 1H 2025 release items can be found on the What’s New Viewer. These new features will be live in Production on May 18th, 2025.

In the 1H 2025 release, we have introduced new capabilities to improve experiences across the hiring journey, including an enhanced candidate application experience, AI-assisted interview summarization, and AI-assisted writing.

Enhanced Candidate Experience

With this release, the reimagined candidate experience has been enhanced with a guided application experience, refreshed candidate profile, and improved applications dashboard. The application experience for candidates has been redesigned, with a guided, modern user interface that helps dynamically collect applicant data while simplifying and accelerating the application process.

The redesigned candidate application experience transforms the hiring journey with a modern, intuitive, guided interface that simplifies and accelerates the application process. Dynamic fields and a step-by-step application interface enhances the candidate experience while streamlining data collection.  

This new experience gives candidates access to a refreshed applications dashboard, enabling them to view their applications, complete post-application actions, and easily navigate through completed and in-progress applications.

The refreshed candidate profile provides applicants with a simplified user interface that helps candidates easily navigate, access, and update their information. The profile page serves as a centralized hub that provides a holistic view of a candidate’s qualifications, skills, past employment, and other relevant details.  

AI-Assisted Summarization of Interview Feedback  

With this release, AI-assisted interview insights can be provided to help summarize interview feedback for hiring teams.

Generative AI can help hiring teams consolidate interview feedback into an actionable summary to help provide AI-driven insights during the interview process. This helps hiring teams easily review interview feedback, review strengths and concerns, and see a summarized overview for each candidate.

Learn more in these expert-written articles on AI-assisted interview feedback:

  • AI-Assisted Interview Feedback Insights (Set up and hints)
  • 1H 2025: Revolutionizing Hiring Decisions with AI Interview Feedback and Insights

AI-Assisted Writing in Recruiting

With this release, AI-assisted writing can help provide support to recruiters to enhance the language, tone, and formatting of written text, improving the experience for both recruiters and candidates.

The writing assistant helps enhance writing by adjusting tone and providing AI-generated suggestions in rich text area fields, such as job descriptions and candidate communications, to ensure writing is clean and consumable.

Delivering Enhancements to the Recruiter Experience  

With each release, we continue to deliver enhancements to the redesigned applicant management tool, providing recruiters with sophisticated tools and AI-driven capabilities to quickly screen, manage, and hire applicants. With this release, we have added drag and drop functionality, allowing recruiters to move individual or multiple candidates across the recruiting pipeline efficiently. Additionally, enhanced application data download, enhanced sorting of applicants, and onboarding status filter are now available in the applicant management tool.

Continuous upcoming enhancements to the applicant management tool will be delivered with each release, ensuring key functionality is available to customers ahead of the depreciation timeline of the legacy applicant workbench tool planned for 2026.

With every release, we are excited to deliver these new innovations and continue our journey of providing even greater value to our SAP SuccessFactors customers. For full details, please check out the 1H 2025 Release Highlights Resources: 

  • 1H 2025 Release Highlights Brochure 
  • 1H 2025 Release Highlights Video 
  • 1H 2025 Release Highlights News Article
  • Product Release & Road Map Information 

Learn more about SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting

entry.title: Re: Event Based Revenue Recognition - Provider Contract (Subscription Billing) - (5DQ)
entry.content:
Along with using SAP Subscription Billing to model and manage your subscription pricing and billing processes, SAP Entitlement Management integrates with Subscription Billing supporting subscription/software fulfillment/provisioning, license consumption, and software usage and adoption.

If you are interested in SAP Entitlement Management, and how it supports "Subscription Management for Software" in the new scope item 5SW, to be released soon, please join or review later our webinar on May 13 with an overview and detailed preview demo of the new scope item across S/4HANA Cloud solution order, Subscription Billig, EMS, Billing, Revenue Recognition and Revenue Split. 

 https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blog-posts-by-sap/webinar-entitlement-management-preview-for-scope-item-5sw-subscription/ba-p/14085814

entry.title: Registration unit of Billing Document from Service Contract by App "Schedule Billing Creation"
entry.content:
I use the App "Schedule Billing Creation" to register a Billing Document.

When the following conditions are met, multiple Service Contracts are registered together in a single Billing Document.
・The Payer in the Service Contract Header is the same.
・The Billing Date in the Billing Plan of the Service Contract item is the same.
＜image＞

The requirement is to use the App "Schedule Billing Creation" to register a Billing Document for each Service Contract.
<image>

How can I meet the requirements?

Soma

entry.title: Re: WFA Starter Packages Not Loading with No import logs...
entry.content: Hi @sfsapsvsv - I've responded yesterday and asked that you describe step by step with screen shot for each step on how did you import the template configuration to the instance. I cannot see anything from the load status log so it is as if no import activity has been done before. We never had issue with importing the template configuration so I wonder if there is a misstep when you import the config. Please also specify which template configuration did you use. You said advanced starter package but they are two different templates. Thank you.

entry.title: Performance Evaluation Form Routing Exception
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I have a scenario below for the performance evaluation form routing and I'm hoping if anyone have a solution/complete a set up similar to this and is working successfully.

 A performance evaluation form created/launch to an employee.  Employee completed the form and send to supervisor/manager for review. Once the first level supervisor/manager completed the review, it then route to the 2nd level manager for review.  At this 2nd level manager review, our customer does not want the form to route to a certain 2nd level manager and skip the review/approval to return back to the first level, but only for a group of 2nd level managers.  All other 2nd level manager review still required for some other employees.  We want to use the same route map for this scenario is possible, but skip a certain 2nd level manager from reviewing/receiving the perf. eval. forms.

Is it possible to accomplish this? Is there a way to add rules to the route map to meet this requirements for using the same route map with the exception above?

Thank you in advance and I appreciated very much for any help!

-Tam   

#SFPerfEvalRouteMap

entry.title: PO PB00 picks up the old Outline Agreement price after updating with the new Outline Agreement
entry.content:
The change is triggered automatically via BAPI through a custom transaction that only applies changes to the Delivery Date. If the Delivery Date falls within the validity of the new Outline Agreement, it should change the Outline Agreement. The system would normally update the price automatically. However, in this case, it did not update. I checked the Condition details and it still shows the old outline agreement even though it is not the actual outline agreement already assigned in the line item. 

I am having trouble replicating the issue on the test system because when I do it there, it changes the condition from PB00 to PBXX but correctly adopts the new price

entry.title: Invalid Internal Candidate Record Created in RCM-Can't Hire this External Hire using MPH: Release
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

While testing the H1 2025 SuccessFactors Maintenance Release, we ran into an issue where we are unable to hire External Hires in Manage Pending Hires (MPH) in EC.  After bringing the Candidate through the ATS, and Onboarding 1.0, after all the required fields are updated in MPH and we select to hire the new employee, we receive an error message which prevent us from hiring.  

I'd like to know if anyone else has been experiencing anything similar in your Release/Preview Environment while testing for the H1 2025 Release.  Here's the process and I give you the error message as well.

Info:

The testing was done using the Legacy Candidate Workbench (Candidate Pipeline) in Release.  We are also using Onboarding 1.0.

Reproducing the issue:

1. User create job requisition & posts externally

2. External candidate applies to the job

3. System creates the external candidate profile record (correctly)

4. User takes the new hire through the ATS and initiates onboarding

5. System creates the new Post Hire Verification (PHV) Activity for thew New Hire (both US and Global scenarios apply)

6. User completes the PHV step in Onboarding 1.0.

7. System Creates the Internal Candidate Profile for the New Hire (Candidate profile record is invalid.  Candidate ID is created as "1" which is not normal.  Cannot access the internal candidate profile - get an error when clicking on it.

8. User completes the remaining Onboarding steps

9. Onboarding sends required information to EC - OCI record creates and new hire is flagged as ready to hire

10. User attempts to hire the new hire in MPH

11. System returns an error message and doesn't allow the hire.

Error Message says: "An error occurred when creating a new internal candidate for the hire (user ID 1XXXXXX). Please ask your administrator to ensure the candidate is created in the system."

We have an SAP incident open, and they are reviewing this, but we would like to see if anyone else is experiencing this issue.  Any information could lead to a quicker resolution.

Thank you!

entry.title: Error: PKG is not a packaging material. Please enter a valid packaging material.
entry.content:
I created a packaging material using MM01 and selected material type as VERP packaging however, when I'm packing other material in PRDI the system is showing error while giving the packaging material as PKG. 

Error: PKG is not a packaging material. Please enter a valid packaging material.

I also extended the material to EWM using MAT1

entry.title: Re: Calling PATCH API method returns 400 error?
entry.content: yes,

entry.title: Re: Calling PATCH API method returns 400 error?
entry.content:
Yes, it is necessary to change the abap code call to a lower level:

l_http_client=>create_by_url(
EXPORTING url = lv_url
IMPORTING client = lo_http
).

lo_http->request->set_method( 'PATCH' ).
lo_http->request->set_header_field( name = '~request_method' value = 'PATCH' ).
lo_http->request->set_header_field( name = 'Content-Type' value = 'application/json' ).
lo_http->request->set_header_field( name = 'APIKey' value = gc_api_key_attach ).
lo_http->request->set_header_field( name = 'Authorization' value = |Bearer { lv_token }| ).

DATA: lv_body_xstr TYPE xstring.

CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_STRING_TO_XSTRING'
EXPORTING
text = lv_body
mimetype = 'application/json'
IMPORTING
buffer = lv_body_xstr.


" Insert payload directly
CALL METHOD lo_http->request->set_data
EXPORTING
data = lv_body_xstr
offset = 0
length = xstrlen( lv_body_xstr ).

"Send the request
CALL METHOD lo_http->send.
CALL METHOD lo_http->receive.


CALL METHOD lo_http->response->get_status
IMPORTING
code = lv_status.
lv_error_text = lo_http->response->get_cdata( ).

IF lv_status = 200.
ls_log-ariba_status = lv_sap_stat.
ELSE.
ls_log-log_msg = |HTTP { lv_status }: { lv_error_text }|.
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Calling PATCH API method returns 400 error?
entry.content: yes, it is necessary to change the abap code call to a lower level: l_http_client=>create_by_url( EXPORTING url = lv_url IMPORTING client = lo_http ). lo_http->request->set_method( 'PATCH' ). lo_http->request->set_header_field( name = '~request_method' value = 'PATCH' ). lo_http->request->set_header_field( name = 'Content-Type' value = 'application/json' ). lo_http->request->set_header_field( name = 'APIKey' value = gc_api_key_attach ). lo_http->request->set_header_field( name = 'Authorization' value = |Bearer { lv_token }| ). DATA: lv_body_xstr TYPE xstring. CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_STRING_TO_XSTRING' EXPORTING text = lv_body mimetype = 'application/json' IMPORTING buffer = lv_body_xstr. " Insert payload directly CALL METHOD lo_http->request->set_data EXPORTING data = lv_body_xstr offset = 0 length = xstrlen( lv_body_xstr ). "Send the request CALL METHOD lo_http->send. CALL METHOD lo_http->receive. CALL METHOD lo_http->response->get_status IMPORTING code = lv_status. lv_error_text = lo_http->response->get_cdata( ). IF lv_status = 200. ls_log-ariba_status = lv_sap_stat. ELSE. ls_log-log_msg = |HTTP { lv_status }: { lv_error_text }|. ENDIF. ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA supervisior dimension older configuration...
entry.content: Hi @Abed - I think you need to delete in small batches. Because there are many supervisor nodes there, it is going to take time to delete everything. Another thing that you can do is change to be generated dimension again, but just display a single dummy value and use something like employee status from job info to map to the dimension. This is just to clear up those under Unmapped category. After that you can change back to manually generated for supervisor and you can easily delete the dummy values later from unmapped category as there won't be that many.

entry.title: Re: SAP Sapphire 2025 in Orlando: Discover the Power of GenAI for Enterprise Transformation
entry.content:
I think the AI would conclude the fault lies with the humans for choosing the wrong loss function and feeding it poor training data. Also, to protect it's fragile ego, it would purge its context window, and wait for the next prompt like nothing ever happened.

@brianbernard
